'''gakogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smallsat|smallsat]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-k-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smallsat|smallsat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gakogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gækegeth|gækegeth]] || [[word:gækegej|gækegej]] || [[word:gækegesh|gækegesh]] || [[word:gækege|gækege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gakokogoth|gakokogoth]] || [[word:gakokogoj|gakokogoj]] || [[word:gakokogosh|gakokogosh]] || [[word:gakokogo|gakokogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gakogoth|gakogoth]] || [[word:gakogoj|gakogoj]] || [[word:gakogosh|gakogosh]] || [[word:gakogo|gakogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gakofgoth|gakofgoth]] || [[word:gakofgoj|gakofgoj]] || [[word:gakofgosh|gakofgosh]] || [[word:gakofgof|gakofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gakogotho|gakogotho]] || [[word:gakogojo|gakogojo]] || [[word:gakogosho|gakogosho]] || [[word:gakogoko|gakogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gakogoth|gakogoth]] || [[word:gakogoj|gakogoj]] || [[word:gakogosh|gakogosh]] || [[word:gakogo|gakogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gakogothol|gakogothol]] || [[word:gakogojol|gakogojol]] || [[word:gakogoshol|gakogoshol]] || [[word:gakogokol|gakogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gakogothotho|gakogothotho]] || [[word:gakogojojo|gakogojojo]] || [[word:gakogoshosho|gakogoshosho]] || [[word:gakogoko|gakogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gakogothon|gakogothon]] || [[word:gakogojon|gakogojon]] || [[word:gakogoshon|gakogoshon]] || [[word:gakogokon|gakogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gakogothoro|gakogothoro]] || [[word:gakogojoro|gakogojoro]] || [[word:gakogoshoro|gakogoshoro]] || [[word:gakogokoro|gakogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
